summary: Vendor Admin RBAC fixes VERIFIED. All critical issues from iteration_7 are now resolved. Orders endpoint accepts vendor role, Analytics page loads completely, Menu Items CRUD works without Access Denied errors.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All vendor pages working without Access Denied errors

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Vendor_RBAC_Item during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Vendor Admin RBAC issues are FIXED. Vendor can now access: Dashboard, Menu Items (full CRUD), Orders, Analytics, Store Settings. No Access Denied errors on any page.

test_results.vendor_get_categories: PASS - Returns categories for vendor's store
test_results.vendor_get_items: PASS - Returns items for vendor's store
test_results.vendor_create_item: PASS - Can create items for their store
test_results.vendor_get_orders: PASS - CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED - No more 403 Access Denied
test_results.vendor_get_orders_filtered: PASS - Can filter orders by status
test_results.vendor_isolation: PASS - Cannot create items for other stores (returns 422)
test_results.dashboard_ui: PASS - Shows stats correctly, no errors
test_results.menu_items_ui: PASS - Shows items, Add Item dialog works
